title: Internship Market Strategy & Go-to-Market
bonus_skills: Prior experience in strategy consultancy or corporate strategy department
matched_skills: Prior strategy/corporate experience (HSBC PMO, ECE, IPC)
Project management and independent task ownership
missing_skills: Student enrollment status (internship requires active university student — candidate holds completed Master's degree)
Data and analytics platform management (specific tool context)
German language proficiency not required but location is Düsseldorf on-site
core_responsibilities: Contribute to data and analytics platform conceptualization and continuous improvement
Support strategy development, action plans and synchronized execution across business units
Manage projects from methodology development to system solution implementation
Prepare management presentations and create decision-driving analyses
Support transformation of Adhesive Technologies division into agile, market-centric organization
recommended_emphasis: OVERQUALIFICATION FLAG: This is a student internship requiring active enrollment in a bachelor's/master's programme. Boru Lai holds completed Master's degrees and has 4+ years of professional experience. Applying may result in immediate screening-out. Consider reaching out to Henkel's full-time strategy or analytics roles instead.
If applying regardless: emphasize current Leuphana Master enrollment status if still formally enrolled, or reframe working student positions to highlight recency of academic context
Highlight C-level management presentation experience (HSBC USD 8M programme) — directly maps to 'prepare management presentations' responsibility
Emphasize data platform and analytics work at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC to match the data & analytics platform improvement focus
Lead with Go-to-Market and market segmentation experience (IPC, GRG) to match title keywords
Stress cross-functional stakeholder management and project ownership — matches 'take ownership for independent tasks' requirement
International exposure across EMEA and APAC directly satisfies the 'ideally complemented by international experience' bonus criterion

company_info.size_raw: Henkel is a globally operating DAX-40 company with approximately 48,000 employees worldwide (public knowledge; not explicitly stated in JD text — falling back to known public data)
